title: cheilanthes ternifolia
intro: Cheilanthes ternifolia, also known as fern-leaf spleenwort, is a species of flowering plant in the asparagus family that is native to the mountainous regions of China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cheilanthes ternifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, and can also be dried and used as a powder or extract for various applications.
